revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24059628705|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:荒河戸畔]]
{{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|children={{ill|Q97539597|qid=Q97539597|1=Tōtsu Ayume Maguwashi Hime}}|father={{ill|Kitone-no-Mikoto|qid=Q97636304|1=Kitone-no-Mikoto}}}}

{{Multiple issues
|notability=2020-07
}}
{{Infobox noble
| name = Arakato-be
| image = 
| imagesize = 
| caption = 
| era = {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|qid=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period|1=Yayoi period}}
| birth_date = Unknown
| death_date = Unknown
| other_names = Arakato-be-no-Mikoto, Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko Arakato-be, Arakato-be, Kii Arakato-be
| posthumous_name = 
| deity_name = 
| Buddhist_name = 
| burial_place = 
| court_Rank = 
| ruler = 
| family = {{ill|Ki clan (ancient Japan)|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki clan (ancient Japan)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}} ({{ill|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 紀伊国造}})
| parents = Father: {{ill|Onitoney no Mikoto|ja|鬼刀禰命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onitoney no Mikoto|1=Kitone-no-Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97636304}}
| siblings = {{ill|Kushitama no Mikoto|ja|久志多麻命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitama no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kagesanako no Mikoto|ja|蔭佐奈胡命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagesanako no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| children = {{ill|Michishimamato no Mikoto|ja|美智支真止乃命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Michishimamato no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Tōtsu Ayume Maguwashi Hime|ja|遠津年魚眼眼妙媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōtsu-Ayume-Maguwashi-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Nakatsuhime|ja|中日女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| notable_info = 
}}
'''Arakato-be''' (あらかとべ, dates unknown) was an ancient Japanese noble and a member of the {{ill|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 紀伊国造}} lineage.
== Overview ==
In the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, she is referred to as '''Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko Arakato-be-no-Mikoto''' or simply '''Arakato-be-no-Mikoto'''. In the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}} "Tenson Hongi" section, she is called '''Kii Arakato-be'''. Genealogical records also use the name '''Arakato-be-no-Mikoto'''.
Arakato-be is described as the fourth or fifth-generation descendant of {{ill|Amanomichine|ja|天道根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tendonone no Mikoto|qq=}}. Her children include {{ill|Michishimamato no Mikoto|ja|美智支真止乃命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Michishimamato no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Tōtsu Ayume Maguwashi Hime|ja|遠津年魚眼眼妙媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōtsu-Ayume-Maguwashi-hime|qq=}}, the consort of {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|qid=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}}.<ref>{{ill|Nakata Norinobu|ja|中田憲信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakata Norinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135491601}}, "Mochizuki," in ''Shokeifu'', Volume 4.</ref> In the "Tenson Hongi," her daughter {{ill|Nakatsuhime|ja|中日女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is identified as the wife of {{ill|Ōaragawa no Mikoto|ja|大新河命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōaragawa no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, an ancestor of the {{ill|Tōtomi Province no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|遠淡海国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōtomi Province no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, {{ill|Kuno no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|久努国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuno no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}, and other clans such as the {{ill|Yatabe no Muraji|ja|矢田部氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatabe no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Yatsudō no Muraji|ja|矢集氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsudō no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== References ==
{{Reflist|qq=}}
== Related articles ==

* {{ill|Tobe|ja|トベ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tobe|qq=}}
* {{ill|List of figures before the Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of figures before the Asuka period|1=list of ancient Japanese figures|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11665973}}
